title: BenchmarkPackConfig
description: Structure of benchmark/config.yaml. All fields optional; runner supplies defaults. Keep small — this is config, not a framework.

seed_required.description: If true, pack MUST ship vault_seed/ and runner refuses packs without it.

subdir.description: Optional subdirectory inside the temp vault where corpus should be ingested. Defaults to vault root.

template_id.description: Named template registered in the QA runner. Mutually exclusive with inline.

subsets.description: Dev/holdout split metadata. The split files themselves live next to questions.json.

dev_file.description: Relative to benchmark/. File must contain an array of question ids from questions.json.

default_subset.description: Which subset optimizer runs use by default.

scoring.description: Scorer behavior knobs. Keep minimal; deterministic primary score is non-negotiable.

weights.description: Optional per-difficulty weight map, e.g. {easy: 1, medium: 2, hard: 3}. Defaults to uniform.

normalize.description: Text normalization applied to both answer and gold_points before substring match.

partial_credit.description: If true, per-question score = matched_points / len(gold_points) when >= gold_points_min. If false, binary pass/fail.

max_questions.description: Hard cap on questions per run. Useful for fast experiments.

advisory_judge.description: Optional secondary LLM-judge. Never primary. Never editable by optimizer during a run.
